body:
## Rationale
`resolution-drum-setup` is absent from the 198 ALBUM_ARTICLES slugs and from all open proposals.

Current Lamb of God arc in DB and proposals:
- New American Gospel 2000 (pending #2863)
- As the Palaces Burn (check DB)
- Ashes of the Wake (check DB)
- Sacrament 2006 (✅ DB)
- Wrath 2009 (✅ DB)
- **Resolution 2012 ❌ MISSING — this proposal**
- VII: Sturm und Drang 2015 (pending #2833)

Resolution (2012) fills the Wrath→VII gap. It's Lamb of God's best-charting album (#3 US Billboard 200). The track "Ghost Walking" was Grammy-nominated for Best Hard Rock/Metal Performance 2013. Chris Adler's drumming on this record is widely cited as a career highlight — dense polyrhythmic patterns on "Desolation" and "Ghost Walking."

## GSC/GA4 signal
- LoG cluster growing: sacrament + wrath in DB, proposals filling gaps
- Chris Adler GSC: 4 impr pos 8.8 — low-volume but building with each LoG article shipped
- Grammy nomination on "Ghost Walking" = AI Overview eligibility hook

## Files to touch
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `resolution-drum-setup` entry
- `/public/llms/articles/resolution-drum-setup.md` — LLM markdown file

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (kit specs, Grammy-nominated track, Adler's polyrhythm approach)
- Internal links ≥3: /drummer/chris-adler, /articles/wrath-drum-setup, /articles/sacrament-drum-setup
- Schema: Article + MusicAlbum + Person JSON-LD

## Estimated uplift
Completes the LoG mid-era cluster (Sacrament → Wrath → Resolution → VII). Grammy hook = AI Overview eligibility. "what drums does chris adler use on resolution" = zero-competition query.

## Verify
1. `resolution-drum-setup` in `Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES)`
2. `/articles/resolution-drum-setup` returns 200, ≥300 words
3. `/llms/articles/resolution-drum-setup.md` returns 200
4. relatedAlbums references `wrath-drum-setup` and `sacrament-drum-setup`
5. Grammy nomination for "Ghost Walking" mentioned in article body

## Done
When slug is in ALBUM_ARTICLES and LLM markdown committed.
title: SEO: Lamb of God 'Resolution' drum setup article (Chris Adler, 2012 — fills Wrath→Resolution→VII arc gap, Grammy-nominated track, closes mid-era LoG gap)
